summary: Read-only R3 consensus recheck of OS_UNFINISHED_IMPROVEMENT_REVIEW_20260708.md against lifecycle, behavior trigger coverage, active task, review backlog, semantic backlog, and compounding concerns. Verdict: AGREE because the revised document explicitly integrates the prior R3 objections as completion conditions and next work, while not claiming the system is already complete.
decisions: The revised document integrates R3 backlog concerns by separating review/semantic backlog health from completion and requiring classified-pending/blocker visibility.
The revised document integrates trigger coverage concerns by forbidding healthy status when required behavior triggers are zero without explicit not_applicable evidence.
The revised document integrates active-task concerns by requiring owner, expected-open reason, freshness window, next action, and active-task budget checks.
The revised document integrates compounding concerns by requiring decay, merge, hold, cold archive, retrieval-lane exclusion, promotion budgets, and contradicted-memory demotion.
Agreement is only on the revised document as work contract, not on DinoBrain being complete.
next_steps: Run remaining reviewers against the exact same revision and require ten non-empty AGREE results.
Implement the new hard gates and keep real-vault status separate from temp-vault verifier success.
